response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video structure: informational screen (00:00-00:10) followed by a music track with user messages. 2. Identified song title 'Ridin' on Dreams' from the screen. 3. Used web search to confirm song details and get full Japanese lyrics for 'Ridin' on Dreams' by hololive IDOL PROJECT. 4. Translated the lyrics to English for the full JSON response. 5. Constructed the JSON objects for the two scenes.
response.global_summary: A video showing an informational screen about 'hololive 7th fes. Ridin'on Dreams', followed by a montage of user messages set to the theme song 'Ridin' on Dreams' by hololive IDOL PROJECT.

scenes.description: An informational screen titled 'Attention For Visitors' about flashing lights and cheering during the performance. No music plays.
The song 'Ridin' on Dreams' plays in the background, overlaid with a montage of many user messages for hololive talents in preparation for the 7th fes. event.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, it's because you were there
Hey, saying thanks again and again
I want to tell you right now
Come on, let's jump on!
Ridin' on dreams
Yeah!!
Wow oh oh...
Hey!! (Hey!!) Hey!! (Hey!!)
Yeah!!
Ah, from a small dream
To feelings that I couldn't even imagine
My excitement won't stop!
No matter how many times we get lost
Our bond becomes the rudder
Even a little anxiety
We can blow it away
We are rowing on an endless journey now
There must be difficulties
Turn even those into strength
And move forward together!
Hey, it's because you were there

Let's overcome the rough waves too
I want to keep shining 'like us'
Hey, the fact that I could meet you
Hey, is a treasure

In a world of the unknown with no map
Let's keep going!
Ridin' on dreams
